events.title: Masterwork recital - Chopin/Grieg/Mörk Karlsen recital
events.description: The piano virtuoso Svein Amund Skara. Skara will perform Frédéric Chopin's complete Ballades (1--4) and complete Scherzos (1--4). Playing all four ballades and all four scherzos in a single evening is a monumental physical and mental achievement. It is extremely rare for an audience to experience these eight works performed together. The Ballades: Chopin's innovative form of piano music. These are deep, emotional, wordless narratives inspired by medieval ballades that could encompass an entire life story. They demand maturity, tone control, and immense virtuosity---such as in the shattering conclusion of the fourth ballade. The ballades are a masterful collection of compositions that span the entire emotional spectrum, from ecstasy to deep despair. The challenge for pianists is to do full justice to these pinnacles of piano literature. The Scherzos: Chopin's scherzos are explosive, demonic, and filled with violent contrasts. Technically, they offer breakneck passages and lightning-fast chord leaps. The concert opens with music from one of Edvard Grieg's international successes, Lyric Pieces. Volume 8 will be performed at this concert. The second act of the concert opens with Piano Sonata in B, a very interesting composition by probably the most recorded contemporary composer in Norway, Kjell Mörk Karlsen. PROGRAMME 19.07.2026 EDVARD GRIEG: Lyrical Pieces book 8, opus 65 FRÉDÉRIC CHOPIN: Scherzo no. 1 in b minor, opus 20 Scherzo no. 2 in b flat minor, opus 31 Scherzo no. 3 c sharp minor, opus 39 Scherzo no. 4 in E major, opus 54 PAUSE KJELL MØRK KARLSEN: PianoSonata in h FRÉDÉRIC CHOPIN: Ballada no. 1 in g minor, opus 23 Ballada no. 2 in F major, opus 38 Ballada no. 3 in A flat major, opus 47 Ballada no. 4 f minor, opus 52 "enormous technical resources" (Aftenposten, Oslo, Norway) "Skara maintained fine control and brought out contrapunctal lines with clarity" (Los Angeles Times) "a truly elegant musician" (Kölnische Rundschau, Cologne, Germany) Event time/concert start: 19:00 Doors open: 18:15 Duration: 130 min Serving: Coffee, tea and biscuits Age limit: No age limit Companion: Free without ticket Access: Bus no. 60 to Kampen stop. (6.13 and 6.43 from Jernbanetorget stop - at the front of Oslo Central Station) Subway no. 1, 2, 3, 4 to Ensjø station. Disabled: No Parking facilities: No Website: www.skara.ch

events.title: Rat's ass with Tamsyn Kelly & Pernille Haaland
Organ Recital with Johannes Zeinler
events.description: Johannes Zeinler (Vienna, Austria), organ Works by Muffat, Grigny, Martin, Mozart, Schönberg and Bach. Dear friends of organ music, Welcome to Oslo Cathedral and this year's summer concert series! Over the course of 15 Saturdays from July to October, we invite you to festive and diverse concerts featuring organists from both Norway and abroad. Each concert has its own distinct character, reflecting the musical background and tradition of the guest performer. During the summer months, when everyday life tends to slow down and time feels more spacious, we wish to present a rich and varied musical program on our cathedral organ, built in 1998 by the Norwegian organ builder Ryde & Berg. We are committed to making organ music accessible to as many people as possible. Please feel free to take the program with you, share it with friends and family, and invite someone along to a concert. Admission is always free for children and students. We look forward to seeing you at Oslo Cathedral and wish you a joyful and inspiring summer! Marcus André Berg and Tjark Pinne Organists of Oslo Cathedral. Accessibility: Oslo Cathedral has dedicated wheelchair spaces in the south transept. Companions enter free of charge upon presenting a companion certificate. Oslo Cathedral has a ramp and an elevator for step-free access. Please arrive at the main entrance, and our staff will guide you to the wheelchair entrance. A wheelchair-accessible restroom is available by the main entrance. For questions; please call Oslo Cathedral, phone: +47 23629010

events.title: The Neighbourhood: THE WOURLD TOUR
events.description: Doors: 18:00 / 6PM Max 6 tickets per order For more information about the concert, artists, entry times, etc. unityarena.no Transport Use public transportation to Unity Arena. See unityarena.no or ruter.no for public transport option. Buyer beware: all meet and greet packages for sale are fraudulent. The artist loves meeting his fans but does not put these items for sale anywhere. Wheel Chair/ Companion Tickets for Wheel chairs and companions General information The organizer reserves the right to deny entry to individuals who refuse a personal search (This may include a body search and inspection of any luggage) Additional info unityarena.no For more information about items that are not allowed inside the arena. Persons who are removed have no right to a refund of ticket expenses. There is no minimum age for the concert, but children under 15 must be accompanied by an adult (as per the Police Act in Bærum Municipality).
